verifier_values.criteria: States that the project was not previously evaluated in an EIR for San Dimas Community College's campus' most recent long-term development plan
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: The prompt indicates that the Project was not previously evaluated in an EIR for San Dimas Community College's campus' most recent long-term development plan.

verifier_values.criteria: States that San Dimas Community College is required to consider alternatives to the Project's location in the Project's EIR
verifier_values.criteria_explanation:
According to the "2024_CEQA_Statute_and_Guidelines_Handbook.pdf at page 59:"

AB 1307 adds PRC Section 21085 providing that for residential projects the effects of noise generated by occupants and guests on human beings is not a significant effect on the environment under CEQA.
This bill also adds Section 21085.2 providing that institutions of public higher education shall not be required, in an EIR prepared for a residential or mixed-use housing (where at least two-thirds of the square footage of the development is designated for residential use) project, to consider alternatives to the location of that project if both of the following requirements are met:
(1) The project is on a site that is no more than 5 acres and is substantially surrounded by qualified urban uses.
(2) The project has already been evaluated in the EIR for the campus’ most recent long-range development plan.

The prompt indicates that "The Project was not previously evaluated in an EIR for San Dimas Community College's campus' most recent long-term development plan." Accordingly, the second requirement is not met and therefore San Dimas Community College must consider alternatives to the location of the Project.
